content: Multiple napari plugins wrap SAM/SAM2 for interactive point-click segmentation with correction: napari-sam (MIC-DKFZ, most mature/cited), napari-segment-anything (royerlab, native Qt UI), napari-SAMV2 (Krishnan Venkataraman, middle-click positive / ctrl+middle-click negative points, aimed at volumetric but works on 2D), napari-sam2long (2025/2026, interactive point clicks + napari's built-in paintbrush/eraser tools for manual correction alongside SAM2 prompts). All plugins reuse napari's native Labels layer (paintbrush, eraser, fill) for post-segmentation manual cleanup, which directly satisfies an 'erase bad region' requirement without custom UI code.
